changes: Added a document-level semi-real probe workflow via `evals/semi_real_probes/manifest.json` and `scripts/evals/materialize_semi_real_probe_suite.py` so real labeled samples can be stress-tested with controlled augmentations.
Hardened withholding address parsing against left-edge crop bleed by stripping name-header prefixes before selecting the final address candidate.
Extended the error taxonomy with `address_label_bleed` so new address/header contamination failures can be auto-classified from review_queue outputs.
Recorded the measured field-group delta for the `left_clip` augmentation in `evals/augmentation_effects/ledger.json`.

kept: withholding address rescue for left-clip label bleed
discarded: using the raw left-clipped address crop without parser rescue
treating address contamination as a spacing-only issue (`address_spacing_merge`) when label/header bleed is the actual cause

next_priorities: Add one more semi-real withholding probe for `jpeg_blocking` or `stamp_shadow` to see whether `applicant_name` or `middle_name` fails under non-crop degradations.
Secure at least one non-eval withholding front-side sample with reviewed labels so region recognizer candidates can move past the current zero-val-sample blocker.
